business_rule_results.name: driver no login
business_rule_results.rule: 司机存在且不登录系统。
business_rule_results.details: 2 mock drivers exist without login fields.

business_rule_results.name: vehicle plate required
business_rule_results.rule: 车辆存在且必须有车牌。
business_rule_results.details: 2 vehicles have plate_number.

business_rule_results.name: contract driver binding
business_rule_results.rule: 合同必须绑定司机。
business_rule_results.details: Every contract driver_id resolves to a mock driver.

business_rule_results.name: contract vehicle binding
business_rule_results.rule: 合同必须绑定车辆。
business_rule_results.details: Every contract vehicle_id resolves to a mock vehicle.

business_rule_results.name: deposit required
business_rule_results.rule: 合同必须有押金。
business_rule_results.details: Every contract has at least one deposit record.

business_rule_results.name: long-term contract
business_rule_results.rule: 支持长租合同。
business_rule_results.details: Open-ended long-term mock contract exists.

business_rule_results.name: time-bound contract
business_rule_results.rule: 支持时限合同。
business_rule_results.details: Fixed-term mock contract exists.

business_rule_results.name: natural month for time-bound contract
business_rule_results.rule: 时限合同以自然月为周期。
business_rule_results.details: Fixed-term contracts use calendar dates suitable for natural-month period checks; real month-cycle execution remains pre-release local verification.

business_rule_results.name: natural week rent calculation
business_rule_results.rule: 所有合同按自然周计算租金。
business_rule_results.details: Every ledger row includes natural_week in ISO week-like format.

business_rule_results.name: selected free-rent days
business_rule_results.rule: 默认免租日必须来自合同生成时选择。
business_rule_results.details: Every contract carries selected default_free_rent_days.

business_rule_results.name: free-rent days reflected in daily ledger
business_rule_results.rule: 免租日应体现在日租金台账。
business_rule_results.details: Selected free-rent dates are present in the daily ledger.

business_rule_results.name: daily ledger by date
business_rule_results.rule: 日租金台账必须按日期生成。
business_rule_results.details: Ledger rows are date-based and fixture contract/date pairs are unique in this smoke dataset.

business_rule_results.name: payment allocation by date
business_rule_results.rule: 付款必须按日分配。
business_rule_results.details: Every allocation resolves to one daily ledger date.

business_rule_results.name: no overpay per day
business_rule_results.rule: 单日不可超付。
business_rule_results.details: No daily paid_amount exceeds rent_amount and allocations assert no_overpay_per_day.

business_rule_results.name: unpaid reason
business_rule_results.rule: 未付日期必须有未付原因或状态。
business_rule_results.details: Unpaid or partial arrears ledger rows carry status and mock unpaid_reason when needed.

business_rule_results.name: current arrears excludes future receivables
business_rule_results.rule: 欠款计算只统计当前日期及以前，当前欠款不包含未来应收。
business_rule_results.details: Contracts explicitly mark current_arrears_excludes_future_receivables=true.

business_rule_results.name: contract document placeholder
business_rule_results.rule: 合同文档使用 placeholder，不使用真实扫描件。
business_rule_results.details: All document references are placeholder:// and real_file_attached=false.

business_rule_results.name: GPS mock status exists
business_rule_results.rule: GPS mock status 存在。
business_rule_results.details: 2 GPS mock status records exist.

business_rule_results.name: GPS not used for rent calculation
business_rule_results.rule: GPS 不参与租金计算。
business_rule_results.details: Rent ledger rows contain no GPS or IOPGPS calculation references.

business_rule_results.name: IOPGPS real sync disabled
business_rule_results.rule: IOPGPS 真实同步默认禁用。
business_rule_results.details: IOPGPS_REAL_SYNC_ENABLED=false for this dry-run.

business_rule_results.name: operation logs
business_rule_results.rule: operation logs 存在。
business_rule_results.details: 3 operation log records exist.

financial_rule_results.name: deposit collect exists
financial_rule_results.details: At least one deposit collect event exists; per-contract deposit presence is covered by BS-005.

financial_rule_results.name: deposit not counted as rent income
ledger contract binding
financial_rule_results.rule: 日租金台账必须绑定合同。
financial_rule_results.details: Every ledger row resolves to a mock contract.

financial_rule_results.name: payment contract and driver binding
financial_rule_results.rule: 付款必须绑定合同与司机。
financial_rule_results.details: Every payment resolves to a mock contract and driver.

privacy_guard_results.name: safe fixture flags
privacy_guard_results.rule: mock 数据必须标记为 mock_data_only 且 not_for_production。
privacy_guard_results.details: All fixture files are marked mock_data_only=true and not_for_production=true.

privacy_guard_results.name: privacy guard
privacy_guard_results.rule: mock 数据不得包含真实隐私数据。
privacy_guard_results.details: No real-looking phone number or national ID pattern detected.

privacy_guard_results.name: secret guard
privacy_guard_results.rule: mock 数据不得包含真实凭据。
privacy_guard_results.details: No enabled credential, token, password, or login-key pattern detected.

production_guard_results.name: production_ready false
production_guard_results.details: production_ready=false is fixed in the dry-run report.

production_guard_results.name: no database execution
production_guard_results.rule: 不真实连接数据库，不真实导入数据。
production_guard_results.details: The dry-run reads JSON fixtures only and performs no database execution.

production_guard_results.name: production guard
production_guard_results.rule: mock 数据不得进入生产。
production_guard_results.details: mock data cannot enter production; production init must not call mock import
